name: Content Pack
description: Turn a project or product idea into a compact set of launch-ready copy. Use when Codex needs to generate practical messaging such as a tagline, README blurb, changelog summary, tweet or thread copy, release notes, or listing text from a single source idea.
short_description: A paste-ready launch copy generator for README blurbs, release notes, listings, and posts.
audience: Solo builders preparing a repo, app, or skill for sharing
Open-source maintainers turning changes into publishable release copy
Launch operators who need consistent paste-ready distribution assets
detail_lines: Starts from one project truth and turns it into short, reusable launch copy instead of disconnected one-off blurbs.
Produces concrete formats such as README intros, changelog summaries, listing text, and social posts.
Keeps claims grounded in the product and uses explicit user-provided context rather than hidden account or marketplace access.
